question: Will the United States and Iran announce a new nuclear deal before July 1, 2025?
background: Israeli media (Hebrew): [Senior ministers were informed: There is a high chance that the US and Iran will reach an agreement](https://www.kan.org.il/content/kan-news/politic/895178/)
resolution_criteria: This question resolves as **Yes** if the US and Iran sign or announce an agreement with respect to Iran's nuclear program.
